name: vibelet-search
title: Vibelet Search
description: Search and resume Claude Code and Codex sessions (CLI + Desktop apps) by title or content.
author: leyang

commands.name: search-sessions
commands.title: Vibelet Search
commands.subtitle: Sessions
commands.description: Search Claude Code and Codex sessions across CLI and Desktop apps

preferences.name: defaultTerminal
preferences.title: Default Terminal
preferences.description: Terminal app used to open resume commands

preferences.name: claudeBinary
preferences.title: Claude CLI Path
preferences.description: Path or name of the Claude Code CLI (default: claude)

preferences.name: codexBinary
preferences.title: Codex CLI Path
preferences.description: Path or name of the Codex CLI (default: codex)
